    G

    game - Variable in class View.Client.Actions.JoinSuccessAction
    The game that the player has successfully joined.
    game - Variable in class View.Client.Actions.UpdateGameAction
    The game instance to update the client state with.
    game - Variable in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelectedState
    The game that has been selected by the user.
    Game - Class in Model
    Represents a game session of Galaxy Trucker.
    Game(MatchLevel) - Constructor for class Model.Game
    Constructs a new Game instance based only on the match level.
    Game(Game) - Constructor for class Model.Game
     
    gameId - Variable in class View.Client.Actions.JoinAction
    The ID of the game that the player wants to join.
    gameID - Variable in class Controller.Controller
     
    gameID - Variable in class Networking.Messages.JoinGameMessage
    The ID of the game that the player wants to join.
    games - Variable in class Controller.Server.Server
     
    games() - Method in class Controller.Server.Server
     
    GameSelectedState - Class in View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn
    Represents a state in which a game has been selected by the user.
    GameSelectedState(Network, String, Game) - Constructor for class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelectedState
    Constructs a GameSelectedState with the specified network, username, and game.
    GameSelectionState - Class in View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn
    Represents the state of the client when the user is logged in and can select games.
    GameSelectionState(Network, String) - Constructor for class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelectionState
    Constructs a GameSelectionState with the specified network and username.
    gamesList - Variable in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelectionState
    The list of available games represented by their IDs.

    getReward(String, RewardType) - Method in class Controller.Pirates.PiratesBatteryRemovalState
    Called when a player attempts to claim a reward directly using only base power (without additional batteries).
    getReward(String, RewardType) - Method in class Controller.Pirates.PiratesRewardState
    Grants a reward to the player if eligible.
    getReward(String, RewardType) - Method in class Controller.Slavers.SlaversBatteryRemovalState
    Allows the player to directly claim a reward (credits only), typically when their base power alone exceeds the slavers' strength without needing batteries.
    getReward(String, RewardType) - Method in class Controller.Slavers.SlaversRewardsState
    Allows the current player to claim their reward if it's of type CREDITS.
    getReward(String, RewardType) - Method in class Controller.Smugglers.SmugglersBatteryRemovalState
    Allows a player to claim a reward directly if their base power alone exceeds the smugglers' threshold.
    getReward(String, RewardType) - Method in class Controller.State
